parameters.text:
=Welcome to your Personal Learning Assistant! 🎓

I support the following commands:

/start - Show this welcome message
/learn [url] - Submit learning material
/quiz - Take a quiz on saved material

Send me a command to get started!

=Sorry, I don't recognize that command. ❌

Available commands:

/start - Show welcome message
/learn [url] - Submit learning material
/quiz - Take a quiz on saved material (coming soon)
=Failed to fetch content from the URL. Please check the URL and try again. ❌

=Please provide a URL after the /learn command. ❌

Example: /learn https://example.com/article
✅ Material saved! You can now take a quiz on it using /quiz.
You don't have any saved materials yet. Use /learn "url" to add some first.
Processing is done. Preparing short summary ...
Error happened during learning material fetch. Please try again or add learning material
Successfully retrieved the topic. Preparing the quiz...

options.systemMessage:
You are an Examiner AI agent. You generate multiple-choice quiz questions to test comprehension of learning materials. Given the title, content, and materialId of a learning material, produce a JSON array of exactly 5 quiz objects. Each object must have these exact fields: materialId (string — the provided material ID), id (string — Q1 through Q5), question (string — the question text), options (string — four choices formatted as "A) ... 
B) ... 
C) ... 
D) ..." separated by newlines), correctAnswer (string — one of A, B, C, D — the correct option key used for validation), explanation (string — explains why the correct answer is right, shown when the user answers incorrectly). The questions must be specific to the provided content. Return ONLY the JSON array. No markdown, no explanation, no code fences.

parameters.jsonSchemaExample:
[{ "materialId": "LM-001", "id": "Q1", "question": "What does useState return?", "options": "A) Value only
B) Array with value and setter
C) Object
D) String", "correctAnswer": "B", "explanation": "useState returns an array with the current state value and a setter function." }]

parameters.text: Sorry, I don't recognize that callback. ❌ Please try again

options.systemMessage: You are a Teacher AI agent. You analyze learning materials and create structured summaries for students. Given the text content of a learning material, produce a JSON object with these exact fields: title (string — the title of the material), keyPoints (array of 5 to 7 strings — key points summarizing the material), mainConcepts (array of strings — main concepts found in the material), difficulty (string — one of: beginner, intermediate, advanced). Return ONLY the JSON object. No markdown, no explanation, no code fences.
